calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. BRIAN MILES, Esq. of Miles Westbrook & Deal LLP (Tel: 925-938-4500) for assignee the National Collection Agency, Inc. (via Zoom videoconference):
EILEEN LONG (Tel: 415-994-1302) as spouse of judgment debtor Brian Molony.

ASSIGNEE THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC.'S HEARINGS ON CLAIMS OF EXEMPTION.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Brian Molony and Eileen Long's Claims of exemption are granted pursuant to CCP Sec. 704.225. Based on the financial statements, the Court finds the funds are necessary for support of the judgment debtor and his spouse.

Monies held by the levying officer are to be returned to the judgment debtor.

Orders signed and mailed out to parties and the Los Angeles County Sheriff's Office.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-05-2021 Continued To Aug-19-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Brian Miles, Esq. (925-938-4500) of Miles Westbrook & Deal LLP for Plaintiff via Zoom.
Eileen Long (415-994-1302), spouse of Defendant, Brian Molony, in propria persona.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

ASSIGNEE THE NATIONAL COLLECTION9 AGENCY, INC.'s HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to August 19, 2021 at 9:30am for Ms. Long to provide creditor with a copy of her claim exemption and attached financial statements.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
